name: Boss Presence

rulesText.description: Temporary enemy-boss overlay. Adds STR +6, DEX +5, CON +8, INT +1, WIS +9, and CHA +10, swaps to the boss HP pool, grants encounter pressure, and is removed when she is tamed, pacified, recruited, purified, or weakened out of boss status.
